name.ja: マッシグ・ニャングラー

requirement.en: During the turn you Normal Summoned this card.

effect.en: Send the top 2 cards of either player's Deck to the Graveyard. Then, you can Special Summon 1 Level 6 or lower monster from your opponent's Graveyard to your field in face-up Defense Position. If it is the first turn of the player going second, you can Special Summon a Level 7 or higher monster from your opponent's Graveyard instead.
